chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No. 1232 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) Fresh Case 1. For order on MA No.16828/24 (urgent) 2. For order on MA No.16829/24 (exemption) 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on MA No.16830/24 (stay) 06.12.2024 Malik Khushhal Khan, advocate for the applicant ********** 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Learned Counsel for the Applicant submits that Shiraz Khan had allegedly nothing to do with the Criminal Misc. Application No. 1232/2024 and that before passing orders the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace ought to have issued notice to him. He has relied upon 2016 SCMR 581. I have read the impugned order which the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has passed, and appreciating the contents of the application under Section 22-A & B Cr.P.C., which directed the Petitioner to simply approach the Police Authorities and record his statement. Neither there is any deprecating remarks against the Applicant, Shiraz Khan nor any negative inference can be drawn from the said impugned order of the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. No case has been made out for any relief in the facts and circumstances of the case. Accordingly, the Application is dismissed of in the above terms. JUDGE ASHRAF
